# Sanjay Joshi

> Auditor, engineer, and builder based in Mauritius. I have expertise in audit and finance, and build digital tools that solve everyday problems.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sanjaycj.com/): Introduction and links into the workshop.
- [About](https://sanjaycj.com/about/): Background, experience, and education.
- [Workshop](https://sanjaycj.com/workshop/): Projects — shipped, in progress, and planned.

## Projects

- [4minit Daily News](https://4minit.xyz): A free automated newsletter delivering Mauritius news in English to over 200 inboxes every morning.
- [4minit Insights](https://4minit.xyz/insights): Mauritius open data made interactive — explore trends, compare, and export shareable charts.
- [0xguessr](https://0xguessr.vercel.app/): A slot-machine web game that "guesses" Ethereum private keys.
